photoHelp: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 2 MB.
conflictModalTitle: Which stage will you check out?
resetAllDataDescription: Wipes the local cache of ALL vira-latas. They will re-sync on their next access. Use with care!
resetConfirm: This will wipe the local cache of ALL users. They will re-sync on their next access. Are you sure?
registrationToggleDescription: Allows or blocks new vira-latas from signing up. When closed, only existing vira-latas can log in.
duckToggleDescription: Master switch for the quack button. When off, the duck button is hidden everywhere for every vira-lata. The Test Quack tile below still works so you can sanity-check the feature.
testQuackDisabledHint: 🚧 The duck feature is currently disabled for all users. This tile still works for diagnostic testing.
metalPlaceTestMode: 🧪 Test Mode (enable Metal Place for today)
metalPlaceTestModeHint: Test mode is on: Metal Place will appear as if today is the configured day.
liveBandTestDescription: Pin a band as "live now" to validate RightNow. Anyone who picked it sees it as current; everyone else falls back to the normal logic.
liveBandTestConflictWithMetalPlace: Live Band Test and Metal Place test mode can't both be on. The other will be disabled. Continue?
timeTravelDescription: Override the app's "now" to test past bands, counts, and /now states. Saved only on this device.
timeTravelQuickDay: Quick jump (22:00 Wacken default; keeps input time if already set)
layoutChaotic: Chaotic layout — scattered patches on vest
layoutNeat: Neat layout — patches stacked in a row
assignBadgeError: Failed to assign patch. Try again.
testQuackDescription: Simulates an in-app toast only (no push). Press the duck — after 15 s you'll see a floating toast from Queen. No database write.
testPushDescription: Sends a real Web Push to this device via the Edge Function. Use this to verify VAPID keys, push subscription, and Service Worker are all wired up correctly.
testPushSent: ✅ Push sent! Check your system notifications.
testPushNoSubscription: ⚠️ No push subscription found. Make sure you granted notification permission on this device.
testPushFailed: ❌ Push delivery failed. Check the VAPID keys and Supabase secrets.
testPushError: ❌ Error calling the Edge Function. Is send-test-push deployed?
consolidateDescription: Snapshot earned year-badges for all vira-latas into archive storage. Idempotent — safe to re-run before festival reset.
consolidateGateHint: Available after the last band ends, or check Force for QA.
consolidateModalBody: This saves year-badges for every vira-lata. Re-running is safe and won't create duplicates.
archivePreviewDescription: Seeds Conquistas Anteriores in IndexedDB only — no Supabase, no consolidate. Scroll up on profile to see it. Clear when done.
archivePreviewActiveHint: Preview mode on — Supabase sync paused for your badge history on this device.
archivePreviewSeeded: Seeded {count} archive badges for {year}. Check Conquistas Anteriores above.
archivePreviewEmpty: Nothing to seed — earn some {year} badges or use the sample button.
archivePreviewError: Could not update archive preview. Try again.
